case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. KIMBERLY SPINGOLA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SPINGOLA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SPINGOLA, KIMBERLY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SPINGOLA, KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPINGOLA, KIMBERLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPINGOLA, KIMBERLY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
